text: This video will illustrate a robotic left lower lobe wedge resection in a 68 year old patient with a metastatic renal cell cancer to the lung.
The lesion can be seen here.
It measures approximately 3.2 centimeters in size.
The short form 45 millimeter stapler is used to essentially wedge out the lesion
Once the lesion was completely excised, it was examined on the back table.
The margins appeared grossly to be negative.
This patient did very well and was sent home on postoperative day number one.
